headline: Shipping companies begin tariff refund push — and promise to pass along the money to customers
summary: Shipping companies have begun applying to collect refunds for tariffs, even as President Trump applies political pressure for them to forgo the money.

headline: UPS to Report Q1 Earnings: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
summary: UPS reports Q1 results on April 28 as oil spikes, tariffs bite and Amazon volumes shrink: focus shifts to higher-margin SMBs and healthcare.
